evals.prompt: I need certificate policy for example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the policy-analyzer skill for this policy analyzer request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects policy-analyzer for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_check_policy, cert_detect_ev.
Keeps the response focused on analyzing certificate policy OIDs for DV/OV/EV classification and compliance checking.

evals.prompt: Analyze the certificate policies and CPS qualifiers for the certificate on example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the policy-analyzer skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects policy-analyzer instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
